businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest internet platform — Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (fintech), Garena (gaming) triple axis
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Southeast Asian, Latin American, and global consumer internet company operating Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (digital finance), and Garena (gaming). FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4% YoY), net income $1.58B (+255%). Friday close $86.00 (+0.99%). Barclays slashed target $226→$120, TD Cowen $138→$100. Shopee testing AI livestream commerce with NBA All-Star Metta World Peace. Logistics/Brazil reinvestment causing short-term margin pressure but building long-term moat. Shopee GMV +25% guidance. Near 52-week low of $77.05. Forward P/E 22.07x, PEG 1.28. Market cap $50.66B.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): #1 Southeast Asian marketplace — GMV commissions, advertising, logistics (~64% revenue)
Fintech (SeaMoney): SPayLater, SeaBank — lending, payments, insurance (~21% revenue)
Gaming (Garena): Free Fire — global battle royale, in-game purchases (~15% revenue)

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable post-profitability turnaround. Undervalued vs. growth.

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $3.90. PEG 1.28 fair vs. growth.

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: High growth sustained. Shopee GMV +25% guidance adds more.

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Margin pressured by logistics reinvestment. Short-term pain, long-term moat.

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Solid for e-commerce. Platform commission model.

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: FCF margin 19.66%. Strong cash generation capability.

growthDrivers.title: Shopee AI Livestream Commerce Test — NBA Star Partnership
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/7): Shopee experimenting with AI livestream commerce featuring NBA All-Star Metta World Peace. Social commerce trend response. Weapon against TikTok Shop.

growthDrivers.title: Logistics & Brazil Reinvestment — Fulfillment 2x Expansion + VIP Program
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/9): Shopee GMV +25% guidance + fulfillment network 2x expansion + VIP program Brazil launch. Intentional margin sacrifice for long-term competitiveness.

growthDrivers.title: FY2025 Net Income +255% — Dramatic Profitability Improvement
growthDrivers.description: Net income $1.58B (vs. FY2024 $0.44B, +255%). Completed transition from losses to massive profitability.

growthDrivers.title: Forward P/E 22x, PEG 1.28 — Historically Undervalued Zone
growthDrivers.description: +36% revenue growth with Forward P/E 22x. RSI 31 near oversold. Potential rebound near 52-week low of $77.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee) + fintech (SeaMoney) + gaming (Garena) triangular ecosystem. 'Amazon of the East' positioning.

moats.description: Shopee leads Southeast Asian GMV. Self-built logistics network.
Shopee → SeaMoney → Garena cross-sell. User lock-in effect.
700M Southeast Asian population, LatAm expansion. Young digital native markets.

competitors.name: Lazada (Alibaba)
competitors.detail: #2 SE Asian e-commerce. Alibaba reducing investment

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Social commerce offensive. Rapidly penetrating Southeast Asia

recentNews.headline: Barclays slashes target $226 to $120, maintains Buy
recentNews.significance: Reflects logistics cost surge concerns. But maintains Buy on long-term growth conviction.

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha Strong Buy $136 — 'short-term pain, long-term growth'
recentNews.significance: Buy call at $95, $136 target (+58% upside). Logistics reinvestment builds long-term moat.

recentNews.headline: Logistics & Brazil reinvestment — Shopee fulfillment 2x expansion strategy
recentNews.significance: GMV +25% guidance + fulfillment network expansion. Short-term margins vs. long-term moat.

recentNews.headline: Shopee tests AI livestream commerce with NBA All-Star Metta World Peace
recentNews.significance: AI + celebrity livestream commerce experiment. Counter to TikTok Shop.

recentNews.headline: TipRanks: Sea earnings call shows profitable growth pivot
recentNews.significance: Shopee EBITDA at least flat guidance + GMV +25%. Balancing growth and profitability.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 11 analysts Strong Buy consensus. StockAnalysis $179.54 (+109%), Investing.com $144.65 (+68%). Even with Barclays $120 downgrade, Buy maintained. Most have long-term growth conviction.

risks.title: Logistics costs surging +43% — margin pressure continues
risks.description: Fulfillment 2x expansion investment driving cost surge. Short-term profitability damage. Recovery takes time.

risks.title: Near 52-week low — technical weakness deepening
risks.description: $86 is only 11% above 52-week low of $77.05. RSI 31 near oversold. Further decline possible.

risks.title: Major analyst target cuts — Barclays $226 to $120
risks.description: Major IB target cuts worsen market sentiment. TD Cowen $138→$100.

risks.title: TikTok Shop competition intensifying
risks.description: Social commerce reshaping SE Asian e-commerce landscape. Shopee GMV share threatened.

risks.title: Share dilution +5.54% YoY
risks.description: Annual 5.54% share dilution. Per-share value erosion risk.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 22x + RSI 31 oversold — bottom-fishing opportunity
buyReasons.rationale: +36% growth with Forward P/E 22x. RSI oversold + near 52-week low. Contrarian buy timing.

buyReasons.title: FY2025 net income +255% — profitability turnaround confirmed
buyReasons.rationale: Losses → $1.58B profit. FCF $4.51B. Sustainable profit model proven.

buyReasons.title: Net cash $7.24B — ample crisis buffer
buyReasons.rationale: Net cash $12.29/share (14% of stock price). Financial safety margin secured.

buyReasons.title: 700M SE Asian population structural growth — long-term TAM
buyReasons.rationale: Young digital native population. E-commerce penetration still early stage.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited at $86.00 is a contrarian buy candidate near 52-week lows with RSI 31 in oversold territory.
FY2025 net income +255%, FCF $4.51B, Forward P/E 22x — fundamentals are solid.
Logistics reinvestment is causing severe short-term margin pressure, but this is an intentional strategy. Shopee GMV +25% guidance supports it.
Barclays cut to $120 but maintained Buy — long-term growth conviction remains. 9 of 11 analysts Strong Buy.
Oversold + earnings improvement + structural growth = medium-to-long-term buying opportunity. Short-term volatility must be accepted.
